hero.headline: The axis that drives your commercial growth
hero.subhead: Sales, training and strategic direction consulting, backed by a data-driven diagnostic.

about.title: About CMD Eje
about.body: We help companies grow by aligning three fronts: how they sell, how they train their people, and how they're led. Every recommendation starts from a data-driven diagnostic, not intuition.

items.name: Sales
items.description: Commercial strategy and sales cycle optimization

methodology.title: How we find the opportunities
methodology.body: Before we recommend anything, we measure. Our diagnostic process uses real data from your business (sales, team performance, management KPIs) to pinpoint exactly where the opportunity is, before designing the sales, training, or direction strategy.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to find your next growth opportunity?
